rulings.Case Title: PRESIDIO KNOLLS SCHOOL, INC., A CALIFORNIA VS. CHRISTOPHER JOSEPH HARNEY
rulings.Calendar Matter: AMENDED MOTION FOR SUMMARY ADJUDICATION Of Its First Cause Of Action For Specific Performance Of Purchase Option
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Thursday October 1, 2015, line 5. Plaintiff's Motion for Summary Adjudication DENIED. Moving party failed to comply with CRC 3.1350(5). Additionally, triable issue of fact exists regarding the termination of the one time option to purchase re: January 22, 2015 exercise of the option being in "good faith". "A purported exercise of an option ¿ does not in and of itself terminate the option" where "the person offering to perform is acting in good faith, and makes a mistake¿" See C. Roberts Natters & Associates v. Cidco (1986) 184 Cal.App.3d 55 and Riverside Fence Co. v. Novak, (1969) 273 Cal.App.2d 656, 662. Material fact number 17, Wong Deposition 77:1-20; Koidin Deposition 111:19-112:9; 117:2-15; 212 2-15; Stricklin Deposition 82:1-18. Plaintiff's objections re: evidence referenced above are overruled. = (501/REQ)
